news.paragraph: UVXY, currently trading around $35.28, is a volatility-tracking ETF. Recent headlines highlight its inverse relationship with market fear, suggesting it can spike when the VIX rises due to investor panic. However, one headline specifically warns against trading leveraged ETFs like UVXY, built to lose value over time, implying a significant long-term risk for traders.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
2 Ways To Profit as the VIX Spikes — No Matter What Comes Next
The VIX Spikes as Investors Panic: 3 ETFs to Trade Market Fear Now

examples.body: $UVXY Lowe’s and Home Depot missed earnings. Let the black Monday market begin.
